notes: Probe-validated but PARTIAL and stale: 58 speech PDFs. country=Gambia; source_url=https://op.gov.gm/speeches; region=Africa; iso3n=270; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext | Speeches are PDFs only: /speeches is a Drupal body field holding a hand-maintained <ul> of links to /sites/default/files/*.pdf. The sibling /<slug> article pages are STUBS (sampled body = 46 chars, 'OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT REPUBLIC OF THE GAMBIA'), not the speeches. PDFs extract cleanly (4k-61k chars). pagination=none is CORRECT: /speeches?page=0,1,2,5,20 all return the byte-identical page (the #53 'served links but none new' shape). Dates 2021-06-23..2024-05-05 for 41 of 58 via an MMDDYYYY filename prefix (VERIFIED MMDD, not DDMM: 11182022 and 10272022 have a >12 second field); the other 17 filenames carry no parseable date and land BLANK -> issue #55 (the date is on the listing, which the engine cannot carry onto a PDF row). Title comes from the filename stem (percent-encoded) because the PDFs open with a boilerplate letterhead, so the first-line fallback would give every row the same useless title. Barrow has been president since Jan 2017 and NOTHING has been published since May 2024 -> ~3 of ~9 years. Follow-ups: a wayback companion for 2017-2021 and for the post-2024 gap.
